## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Changes

-
-

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `feat!:` / `fix!:` Breaking change
- [ ] `refactor:` Code refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `chore:` / `ci:` / `build:` Tooling or dependency update
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `perf:` Performance improvement
- [ ] `test:` Tests only

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test` / `npm test`)
- [ ] No regressions in related areas

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits: `type(scope): description`
- [ ] No debug code, console.logs, or print statements left in
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (handled automatically on merge)
